reasoning: To win the 2025 calendar gross on Box Office Mojo, Zootopia 2 would need to earn more by December 31, 2025, than any other movie released that year. Zootopia 2 is scheduled to open over the Thanksgiving weekend (November 26, 2025). The highest-grossing film of the year thus far is 'A Minecraft Movie' (around $423M domestically), and there are numerous other enormous hits like Superman and Jurassic World Rebirth well past $300M. Tracking for Zootopia 2 puts its 5-day opening at around $125M. Historically, Thanksgiving Disney releases with a ~$100M-$130M opening (e.g., Moana, Frozen on Thanksgiving, Ralph Breaks the Internet) make 2.5x to 3x that amount by December 31. That math puts Zootopia 2's potential calendar gross around $300M-$350M, far short of the $423M+ needed to take the #1 calendar spot for 2025. Given its release date and current tracking, it is practically physically impossible for Zootopia 2 to be the #1 movie of 2025 by Dec 31.
